title: limonium australe
intro: Limonium australe, also known as the Australian sea lavender, is a flowering plant species native to the coastal regions of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Limonium australe include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
